channel.title: Crime Docket - Latest News
channel.description: Independent forensic-first true crime journalism. Court filings, FOIA releases, and evidence-based reporting.

item.title: Holdback Evidence Corroborates Tip in Brian Shaffer Disappearance
item.description: A new tip aligns with holdback evidence in the 2006 Brian Shaffer disappearance. Investigators evaluate the Columbus Ohio cold case lead for verification.

item.title: Ballistics Link Firearm to Tommy Ballard Bardstown Homicide
item.description: Explore the forensic evidence in the Tommy Ballard homicide. FBI investigators link ballistics and a $50K reward to the unsolved Bardstown, Kentucky murder.

item.title: Evidence Review: Toledo Unsolved Homicide of Alfonzo Carpenter
item.description: Forensic analysis of the unsolved homicide of Alfonzo Carpenter Jr. in West Toledo. Law enforcement seeks new ballistic or witness evidence to break the case.

item.title: Archival VHS Footage Solves 1990 William Arnold Newton Cold Case
item.description: Forensic analysis of archival VHS tape footage has solved the 1990 West Hollywood cold case of William Arnold Newton, resulting in a prison confession.

item.title: Forensic Review: 1993 Cleveland County Unsolved Rest Stop Murder
item.description: Analyze the forensic evidence in the 1993 Cleveland County unsolved murder of Charles Porter at an I-85 rest stop. Police actively seek leads in this cold case.

item.title: Forensics Break 1987 Roseville Unsolved Homicide Case
item.description: Forensics lead Roseville Police to name Robert Osborne as a person of interest in the 1987 unsolved homicide of Sue Capistrant. Analyze the timeline and data.

item.title: Blunt Force Trauma Misclassified at Compromised Ohio Scene
item.description: Analyze the forensic failures in the unsolved 2017 homicide of Amy Jo Nelson in New Straitsville, Ohio, including crime scene contamination and autopsy data.

item.title: 15 Gunshots, Zero Witnesses in Kendric Price Homicide Case
item.description: The Boston Police Department continues investigating the unsolved Kendric Price homicide in Dorchester, where 15 shots were fired but no witnesses have spoken.

item.title: Lake Albano Cold Case: Surgical Precision in 1955 Homicide
item.description: Review forensic evidence in the 1955 Antonietta Longo cold case at Lake Albano, where post-mortem analysis revealed surgical precision and missing anatomy.

item.title: NSW Parliamentary Inquiry Targets Unsolved Murders 1965-2010
item.description: The NSW Parliament has launched an inquiry into unsolved murders from 1965-2010, spurred by unpublished forensic details in a 1971 suspect confession.

item.title: Genetic Genealogy Solves 44-Year California Cold Case
item.description: Investigative genetic genealogy successfully closes a 44-year California cold case, using DNA from a discarded cup to secure a murder indictment.

item.title: Hair Match & Confession Close 1962 Carol Ann Dougherty Cold Case
item.description: Bucks County officials have solved the 1962 Carol Ann Dougherty cold case using microscopic hair analysis and a 2024 confession to identify William Schrader.

item.title: DNA Solves 1991 Austin Yogurt Shop Murders Cold Case
item.description: Trace DNA analysis has identified Robert Eugene Brashers as the perpetrator in the 1991 Austin Yogurt Shop Murders, overcoming crime scene evidence degradation.

item.title: NH Cold Case Unit Expands Forensics to Clear 126 Cases
item.description: The New Hampshire Cold Case Unit expands its forensic task force to tackle 126 unsolved homicides and missing persons utilizing advanced genetic genealogy.

item.title: Genetic Genealogy Secures Life Sentence in Karen Stitt Murder
item.description: Discover how investigative genetic genealogy and preserved blood evidence secured a life sentence for Gary Gene Ramirez in the 1982 Karen Stitt murder.

item.title: DNA Trash Pull Solves 2011 'Baby Angel' Cold Case in Winona
item.description: Minnesota authorities used investigative genetic genealogy and a covert DNA trash pull to solve the 2011 Baby Angel cold case in Winona. Arrest details inside.

item.title: Forensic Review of 1991 Cynthia Gonzalez Homicide Ends in No Bill
item.description: An Arlington PD cold case arrest driven by a UTA forensic case file review ended in a grand jury no-bill. Examine the evidence in the 1991 Gonzalez homicide.

item.title: Forensic Review Advances Nairn Banker Murder Cold Case Inquiry
item.description: Police Scotland completes a significant data review in the 2004 Nairn Banker Murder cold case, leveraging new forensic DNA analysis to examine key evidence.

item.title: Ski Mask Evidence Renews Focus in Karen Lynn Douglas Cold Case
item.description: Texas DPS offers a $6,000 reward in the 1981 Karen Lynn Douglas cold case. Texas Rangers seek to match physical evidence to a string of Harris County invasions.

item.title: DNA Solves 1994 Infant Cold Case: Monterey County Mother Sentenced
item.description: Advanced DNA forensic testing solves a 1994 Monterey County cold case, leading to a 13-year prison sentence for a California mother in infant manslaughter.
